title: draba reptans subsp. stellifera
intro: Draba reptans subsp. stellifera, also known as starry whitlowgrass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of starry whitlowgrass can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
